chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 483 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 2244/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on CMA 2225/2025 (Ex) 4. For hearing of main case. 17.04.2025. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Bhatt, Advocate for petitioners. *********** Learned counsel for the petitioners under instructions does not wish to press this petition and submits that after proper documentation and notice issued to the respondents if petitioners feel aggrieved, they will file fresh petition. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
